decisions.title: Six-gameplan portfolio mapped to the proposal milestones
The proposal document is the specification of record
Engine-side work executes in the Clauderizer repo under its own memory
All reads via the versioned JSON contract; CLI --json is the primary transport
Stack: Node >=24 ESM core, Preact publish-time-built frontend, dependency austerity
Electron app primary, npx tab mode secondary, one transport-agnostic core
Security baseline ships inside Milestone 1, before any RCE-shaped surface
The fence: no interpretation of agent output; completion is process exit plus state transition
tmux is the persistence substrate; Windows persistence requires WSL
Terminal-first gameplan creation is sequenced into m2, after the PTY subsystem exists
React-to-state: every surfaced condition carries its reaction, split by shape
Vocabulary education is core UX: hints everywhere from m1, chips at m2 (un-parks Appendix B)
Product identity: project management meets workflow management at best-in-class console quality; operator-first, teach-ready
Completion semantics for REPL agents: dispatch requires run-to-completion modes; a budget-kill with an observed transition is a completion
Dispatch cost posture: fresh sessions are the accepted cost; PhaseKeep never models provider caching
Interactive sessions close the loop by input and state, never by reading output: checkpoint button now, state-quiescence reap as an m3 prototype
Session reuse for immediate continuation: max_phases_per_session, fresh by default, never idle keep-alive
Telemetry adapters are enrichment-only: numeric fields from host-local surfaces, never content, never load-bearing
Quiescence is a conjunction, and the journal is a write-ahead log
Quiescence probes are measured, baselined at dispatch, and shadow-calibrated before they enforce
Quiescence signal admission: host-uniform signals define idle; per-profile signals are veto-only
Transport resolved: CLI --json only for Milestone 1; MCP adds nothing Phase-1-needed (closes §16.4 / m0 O-01)
